title: Add Node.js filesystem integration tests
description: Vision gap: cross-environment consistency tests use mock backends only. Create test/node-fs-integration.test.ts using real Node.js fs module wrapped in AgenticFileSystem interface. Test core commands (ls, cat, grep, mkdir, rm, cp, mv) against real filesystem with temp directory. Use os.tmpdir() + unique prefix, clean up in afterAll. This resolves the major vision gap for missing real integration tests.
